# Jodit (vendored)

Rich-text editor used by the shared `CBMRichText` component
(`/shared/richtext.js`). MIT-licensed (see `LICENSE.txt`).

- Version: **4.13.3** (npm package `jodit`, `es2021.en` build — English-only)
- Source: https://registry.npmjs.org/jodit/-/jodit-4.13.3.tgz
  (files copied verbatim: `es2021.en/jodit.min.js`, `es2021.en/jodit.min.css`,
  `LICENSE.txt`)

To upgrade: download the new tarball, copy the same three files here, and
re-verify an editor round-trip (load CRM HTML → edit → save) in one of the
staff tools.
